actionUnits.condition: Auto-run the per-frame controller update loop to fire events. Scene config: MonoBehaviour_1 (id=949, guid=adde9bdea083943199c7959004756e60) = GvrController with emulatorConnectionMode=USB(1). MonoBehaviour_0 (id=948, guid=7dda4bb2d5509e44e978d2bf56e25d7c) = GvrArmModel with addedElbowHeight=0, addedElbowDepth=0, pointerTiltAngle=15, fadeDistanceFromFace=0.32, tooltipMinDistanceFromFace=0.45, followGaze=DuringMotion(1), useAccelerometer=false(0). Expected behavior: OnEnable auto-starts EndOfFrame coroutine on GvrController -> UpdateController -> invokes GvrController.OnControllerUpdate each frame; GvrArmModel.Start subscribes to GvrController.OnControllerUpdate and its handler runs arm model update and then raises GvrArmModel.OnArmModelUpdate.

Recenter and connected-state coverage. Requires controller provider/emulator to: (a) set controllerState.connectionState=Connected so GvrArmModel.UpdateFromController() path executes; (b) trigger a recenter sequence so GvrController.Recentered == true for one frame, which causes GvrArmModel.ResetState() at the next OnControllerUpdate. Scene config: same as above (GvrController id=949, GvrArmModel id=948). Expected events: GvrController.OnControllerUpdate fires each frame; within GvrArmModel's handler, when Recentered is observed, ResetState() is executed then normal ApplyArmModel/UpdateTransparency/UpdatePointer; GvrArmModel.OnArmModelUpdate then fires.
